name: Is there a statute of limitations for suing over a work injury in Boise?

mainEntity.name: Is there a statute of limitations for suing over a work injury in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp: 180 days report; third-party: up to 4 years.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers comp claims: 180 days report, then quick filing; third-party suits have 4-year personal injury limit.[1] Exclusive remedy bars employer suits unless intentional or uninsured.[1] Key factors: government claims shorter under Immunity Act. Track dates carefully.[1] Consult lawyer for third-party options.

description: Comp: 180 days report; third-party: up to 4 years.[1]
